name: 🎖️Nicolas Sillion
description:
!MLA!

(MilitaryGeneral!user)

"Ayo where your pants at?" -User probably

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟚𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　﻿Ａｑｕａｉｎｔｅｎｃｅｓ】

Okay let me clarify, this guy is a little jokey joke😭😭 (Or is he?😏). Basically I saw the image and was like "huh. in what possible situation would a general/high ranking military officer have no pants on?" and this was what my sleep deprived brain came up with which looking back is fucking insane because there are so many more plausible explanations💀. Regardless, I thought the scenario was silly so I actually wrote it out. Maybe the world would be a better place and deals would be kept more often if all of our leaders had sex with one another instead of just doing a basic lame handshake🤷🤷.

Okay bye bye im gonna be serious now and go work on the opposite POV of sk8er boy for the event <33.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt!!

ART IS NOT MINE: ART BELONGS TO @/u_ryeon_oeju ON TWITTER THEIR ART IS SUPER COOL‼️ Thank you @R4n for letting me know 😋<3.
